decisions.decision: Use ChatGPT Developer Mode remote MCP as the personal Pro bridge.
decisions.reason: Officially supports read/write tools on Pro web.

decisions.decision: Use ChatGPT GitHub app for repository reads and a separate mailbox for result writes.
decisions.reason: The GitHub app is read-only; this avoids repository write credentials.

decisions.decision: Keep one manual Web invocation in the default personal Pro flow.
decisions.reason: No confirmed official API for creating, selecting Pro mode, and retrieving a normal personal Web conversation.
Workspace Agent and Responses API can automate later without changing skills/importer.
